Definition: size-corrected surface dimension of the frontal lobe (endocast surface)
Note: relative/allometric measure (not an absolute surface or volume); not merged into __merging_volumes

Definition: size-corrected surface dimension of the parieto-temporal lobe (endocast surface)
Note: relative/allometric measure (not an absolute surface or volume); not merged into __merging_volumes

Definition: size-corrected surface dimension of the occipital lobe (endocast surface)
Note: relative/allometric measure (not an absolute surface or volume); not merged into __merging_volumes
levels: Homo habilis s.l.; African and Georgian Homo erectus s.l.; Asian Homo erectus; Neandertals s.l.; AMH (anatomically modern Homo sapiens)

Definition: lobe name exactly as printed in Table 3
number of specimens contributing to the sample x lobe cell
Note: varies by lobe within a sample (e.g. Asian H. erectus: 15 frontal / 14 parieto-temporal / 16 occipital)

Definition: mean size-corrected surface dimension of the lobe
Note: dimensionless index (allometrically size-corrected); see paper Methods for the correction

Definition: size-corrected coefficient of variation of the lobe surface
Note: sample size-corrected CV (V*) as defined in the paper

Definition: surfaces of frontal, parieto-temporal and occipital lobes were size-corrected (adjusted for overall endocast size) before comparison
Note: see Balzeau et al. 2012 Materials and Methods; regression parameters for surface vs endocranial volume are in the paper's Table 2
